title: Count Blocks
description: This datapack adds a number to the items you have on the floor and if you throw an item that cannot be stacked in 64 its name is added
body:
![Count Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c0d92082c07f986c90da45dfc5be1b659dc3dbe.png)

This datapack adds a number to the items you have on the floor and if you throw an item that cannot be stacked in 64 its name is added

## **FEEDBACK**
[Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/count-blocks/)
